architecture_fit.note: Soft-min attention (logits −β(d_u+w), softmax over predecessors, logsumexp soft-min read-out) recurrent n−1 hops, MLP dropped — a tight, faithful delta from base_model self-attention that hits distance_accuracy=1.0.

baseline_comparison.note: One-hop no-propagation strawman on identical graphs collapses 0.46→0.06 as n grows while the method stays at 1.0; lift_over_baseline_canonical=0.77.

faithfulness.note: Hop-ablation curves causally knock out relaxation depth and show accuracy collapsing toward the one-hop baseline; larger graphs need more hops, the genuine mechanism here.

operating_range.note: Exact across the full 8→64 sweep (robustness=1.0) plus a β temperature sweep, though no breaking point is exposed and the size range is ~1 order of magnitude.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entirely hand-built circuit with zero learned parameters — the min-plus relaxation is written out explicitly in torch.

visual_judgement.note: Four focused panels (hop ablation, pred-vs-true scatter, β sweep, attention tree) each map to a distinct claim and are legible, if slightly dense.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties each panel to a specific goal claim — faithfulness, correctness/strawman, soft-min temperature, predecessor mechanism — with right axes and baselines.

notes: A clean, hand-built soft-min attention circuit that genuinely implements iterated Bellman-Ford relaxation as softmax attention, reaching exact distance accuracy (1.0) across the whole 8→64 sweep while a one-hop strawman collapses. Faithfulness is well-supported by the hop-ablation causal check and the work is a minimal, well-documented delta from base_model with no learned weights. Loses the top tier only because the operating range never exposes a breaking point and the 4-panel demo is mildly dense.
